codeReview.summary: The dependency-setup commit is narrowly scoped to adding the Workflow and Workpool packages, registering both Convex components, and updating the lockfile. The resulting component names line up with the later workflow and dispatch modules, and I did not find a correctness issue in this feature.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `4005ac99ab3450ad86e11850ab8220d26fd145fa` for `install-orchestration-deps`. The dependency and component registration changes are coherent and I found no code defects in this feature.
